policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-evh-06 - Authorization for the Event Hub Namespace'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Event+Hubs#IncidentremediationEventHubs#drcp-evh-06 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP EventHub Root managed access key
policyDefinition.description: This policy audits whether or not authorization rules are in place that are not assigned to a Root Managed Shared Access Key.

drcp.name: EventHubRootManageSharedAccessKey
drcp.controlDesc: Authorization for the Event Hub Namespace

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Deny, Audit or Disabled.
